sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Appropriation Short title
sections.text:
This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Appropriation Short title
and
(2006) Act, 2008. commencement

sections.heading: On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, it is
sections.text:
On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, it is
Supplementary
hereby confirmed that there was expended from the general revenues Appropriation
of the Republic, such moneys indicated in respect of the services of
the Republic specified in the third column of the Schedule, being
expenditure in excess of the moneys appropriated for the services of
the Republic by the Appropriation Act, 2006.
Act No. 17 of
2006
Copies of this Act can be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K1,000 each.
172 No. 9 of 2008] Supplementary Appropriation (2006)
